retro.notes: All 7 requirements are fully satisfied. The implementation correctly handles all three freshness states with proper exit codes, supports both text and JSON output formats, registers in the SCRIPTS map, and bounds file traversal at 10,000 files per side with warnings. The unplanned changes are all spec/flow artifact files (draft, flow.json, issue-log, qa, review, spec, tests) which are expected SDD workflow outputs rather than unintended code changes.
